# Website reveal motion implementation parameters - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: page entry, dashboard first load, Liquid Glass hero, SaaS landing page, AI workspace
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/website-reveal-motion-parameters

Visual traits:
- blur-in
- rise from bottom
- staggered reveal
- soft settle
- premium motion
- glass panel entry

Use when:
- page entry
- dashboard first load
- Liquid Glass hero
- SaaS landing page
- AI workspace

Avoid when:
- frequent route changes
- low-end mobile heavy page
- critical workflow requiring immediate response
- large tables with many animated rows

AI summary: Website reveal implementation parameters: background 500-700ms, hero 650-900ms, toolbar 520-720ms, cards 560-760ms with 80-140ms stagger, blur/translate/opacity reveal, cubic-bezier smooth or soft spring easing, reduced-motion fallback.

# Website reveal motion implementation parameters - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: page entry, dashboard first load, Liquid Glass hero, SaaS landing page, AI workspace
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/website-reveal-motion-parameters

- Reveal background atmosphere first, then hero glass panel, then toolbar/search/CTA, then section headers, then cards with stagger.
- Keep the full reveal sequence around 900-1200ms so it feels premium but does not block use.
- Set final states in CSS/DOM immediately and use animation only as enhancement.
- For glass UI, animate container opacity/blur/translate; avoid animating backdrop-filter on many child elements at once.

AI summary: Website reveal implementation parameters: background 500-700ms, hero 650-900ms, toolbar 520-720ms, cards 560-760ms with 80-140ms stagger, blur/translate/opacity reveal, cubic-bezier smooth or soft spring easing, reduced-motion fallback.

# Website reveal motion implementation parameters - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: page entry, dashboard first load, Liquid Glass hero, SaaS landing page, AI workspace
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/website-reveal-motion-parameters

- Under prefers-reduced-motion, skip translate and blur; use opacity 0 to 1 over 120-180ms or no animation.
- Do not delay keyboard access to controls while visual reveal is running.
- Avoid repeated page reveal on every minor route or tab change.

AI summary: Website reveal implementation parameters: background 500-700ms, hero 650-900ms, toolbar 520-720ms, cards 560-760ms with 80-140ms stagger, blur/translate/opacity reveal, cubic-bezier smooth or soft spring easing, reduced-motion fallback.

# Website reveal motion implementation parameters - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: page entry, dashboard first load, Liquid Glass hero, SaaS landing page, AI workspace
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/website-reveal-motion-parameters

- Background atmosphere: opacity 0 to 1, blur 18px to 0, duration 500-700ms, easing cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1).
- Hero panel: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(34px) to 0, blur 12px to 0, duration 650-900ms, delay 80-120ms, easing cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1).
- Toolbar/search/CTA: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(22px) to 0, blur 8px to 0, duration 520-720ms, delay 160-220ms.
- Tabs/header: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(16px) to 0, duration 420-600ms, delay 220-300ms.
- Cards: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(28px) to 0, scale(.975) to 1, blur 10px to 0, duration 560-760ms, stagger 80-140ms per card.
- Notification/toast entry: translateX(24px) or translateY(18px) plus opacity, duration 360-520ms, easing cubic-bezier(.2,1.2,.2,1) for spring-like settle.
- Fallback easing when spring is unavailable: cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) for smooth reveal; cubic-bezier(.2,1.25,.25,1) for soft overshoot.
- Use will-change: transform, opacity, filter only during animation; remove or limit persistent will-change after settle.

AI summary: Website reveal implementation parameters: background 500-700ms, hero 650-900ms, toolbar 520-720ms, cards 560-760ms with 80-140ms stagger, blur/translate/opacity reveal, cubic-bezier smooth or soft spring easing, reduced-motion fallback.
